title: Lesson 38
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: something that people do for work, school, or fun
words.example: Swimming is my favorite summer activity.

words.meaning: a decision or promise accepted by two or more people
words.example: We made an agreement to share the cost.
Please give your attention to the speaker.

words.meaning: the power to manage or direct something
words.example: The driver lost control of the car on the ice.

words.meaning: a series of lessons or a direction of movement
words.example: I joined an online course in business English.

words.meaning: a person who buys goods or services
words.example: The customer asked for a larger size.
The two companies made a deal yesterday.

words.meaning: the outside line or limit of something
words.example: Do not stand near the edge of the platform.

words.meaning: something that shows what a group or idea is like
words.example: This sentence is an example of the new grammar.

words.meaning: the surface of the earth or floor outside
words.example: The ground was wet after the rain.
